mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-01#SQL001 */ * FROM ( SELECT count(*) over() as totalRow, T.* FROM ( SELECT A.BB_IPO_PO_KBN, A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE, B.ATTACHED_BRAND, A.BB_PRODUCT_NAME, NVL(B.PRESENTATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.BB_SETTLE_DATE)) AS BB_SETTLE_DATE, B.MAX_ALLOCATION, A.BB_STOCK, TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AS BB_PRESENTATION_FROM_ORDER, TO_CHAR(NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') || ' ～ ' || TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS BB_PRESENTATION, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') > TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') THEN '受付前' WHEN TO_CHAR(NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AND TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') <= TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AND A.BB_URGENT_STOP = '0' THEN '受付中' WHEN TO_CHAR(NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AND TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') <= TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AND A.BB_URGENT_STOP = '1' THEN '受付停止' WHEN TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') < TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') THEN '受付終了' ELSE ' ' END AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.BB_PERIOD_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ～ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.BB_PERIOD_TO, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS BB_PERIOD, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PAYMENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS PAYMENT_DATE, DECODE(A.BB_UNIT_KBN, '1', '株', '2', '円', '3', '口', '株') AS BB_UNIT_KBN, B.CIGARETTE_SHOW_FLAG, B.EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG, B.CHANGE_BB_PERIOD_FLAG, B.CHANGE_PRICE_FLAG FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(B.PRESENTATION_FROM) WHERE NVL(B.PRESENTATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.BB_SETTLE_DATE)) >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STO_BOSYU_MASTER SBM WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = SBM.SBM_PRODUCT_CODE AND SBM.SBM_SYOHIN_TYPE = '21' ) ) T ORDER BY T.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM_ORDER DESC, T.BB_PRODUCT_CODE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{querySizeLimit}
